name: Auto Liquidators Plus
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealer serving Dallas, Tyler, and Waco, TX since 1991. Specializes in vehicle financing for buyers with less-than-perfect credit.
description_long:
Auto Liquidators Plus is a Buy Here Pay Here (BHPH) used car dealership headquartered in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, with additional locations in Tyler and Waco, Texas. The company has operated since 1991, giving it over three decades in the subprime auto market. It targets buyers across North, Central, and East Texas who may have difficulty qualifying for conventional dealer or bank financing.

The dealership offers in-house financing on a rotating inventory of pre-owned vehicles, including sedans, pickup trucks, and SUVs. Buyers can begin with an online pre-approval form on the company's website without requiring a hard credit pull upfront. Inventory is searchable by body style and price range, with listed vehicles priced from under $16,000 up to $20,000 and above. The financing and vehicle purchase are handled on-site at any of the three locations.

What distinguishes Auto Liquidators Plus from many BHPH competitors is its longevity and multi-location footprint. Customer reviews consistently name individual sales representatives — including Jacob, Jennifer, Leslie, Andre James, Emma, and Victoria Vargas — suggesting a staff-driven, relationship-oriented sales model. The dealership promotes a low-friction approval process, with multiple reviewers describing same-week approvals and same-day vehicle delivery.

As with most Buy Here Pay Here operations, prospective buyers should approach with clear expectations. Interest rates on BHPH loans are typically significantly higher than those available through banks, credit unions, or captive lenders, and the total cost of financing is not disclosed on the website. Vehicle selection is limited to on-lot inventory, and down payment requirements apply. The model is primarily designed for buyers with damaged or no credit history who have exhausted traditional financing options — not for borrowers seeking the lowest-cost auto loan.
pros: Operating since 1991 — over 30 years in the subprime auto market
Three physical locations covering Dallas, Tyler, and Waco, TX
Accepts applicants with less-than-perfect credit history
Online pre-approval form available before visiting a dealership
Inventory searchable by body style (sedan, pickup, SUV) and price range
Reviews consistently name specific staff, suggesting accountable service model
Multiple reviewers report same-week approvals and same-day vehicle pickup
cons: Interest rates and loan terms are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Vehicle selection is limited to current on-lot inventory across three locations
BHPH financing typically carries significantly higher APRs than traditional auto lenders
Serves Texas only — no utility for out-of-state buyers
Down payment is required; website does not specify minimum amounts
best_for: Texas residents with damaged credit or prior repossessions who cannot qualify for traditional auto financing
Buyers in the DFW, Tyler, or Waco area needing a vehicle quickly with same-week approval
First-time buyers with thin or no credit history
Subprime borrowers who have been turned down by conventional dealerships or banks
diagnosis: Auto Liquidators Plus is best for Texas-area buyers with poor or no credit who need a vehicle and have been rejected by traditional lenders — the in-house financing model removes the bank from the equation entirely. The main caveat is that BHPH loans carry higher interest rates and the dealership does not publish APRs or loan terms online, so buyers should request full financing disclosures before signing.
services: Buy Here Pay Here in-house vehicle financing
Inventory browsing by price range (under $16K to $20K+)
On-site finance consultation with named representatives
Vehicle delivery same week as approval
